g.text: Per-day net change for the 12 meta-parameters, 33 daily snapshots. The warm box and grey box highlight the two positive-correlated clusters (outputs r=0.99, personality r=0.99) found by H9; the dark box highlights the trade-off axis (dwell_influence ↔ exploration r=−0.94). The 12-dial personality is a 3-factor system.
